title: Copper Overhaul
description: A Vanilla-Plus mod that adds new copper block variations, a wrench tool, an upgrade system for armors, a chest locking system, and elevator mechanics using magnetism.
body:
![Main image of the mod](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/983427746334117898/cfimg_text.png)

Feel like copper is kinda useless? Copper Overhaul fixes that by adding more variety for copper blocks, new items, tools such as the wrench and chest locks, an upgrade system for armours and brand new elevator mechanics using magnetism and copper conduits!

[Copper Overhaul CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/copper-overhaul-cit) is highly recommended for the mod to work properly ![Copper, Reimagined](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/979889540443545621/copperreimagined.png) ![Block Variations](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/983285301415911444/blockvariations.png) ![Wrench tool](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/981847440871284806/wrench-new.gif) ![Lightning armor](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/979957865542455306/lightning.gif) ![Elevator mechanics](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/980378784958124032/elevatorsystem.png) ![Chest Locking](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/983285312610504734/lockingsystem.png) ![Key copying](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/985784853331071026/locksmithingtable.png) ![Copper Wires](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977352828903362592/986470737835614208/copperwires.png) ![Addons](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/980380398146158602/addonstext.png) [![Copper Overhaul CIT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/980384182775730217/addon_cit.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/copper-overhaul-cit) [![Help? Wiki](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/983288535509512223/visitwiki.png)](https://github.com/ACovTeam/CopperOverhaulWiki/wiki) [![Help? Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/983288535849271296/vistdiscord.png)](http://discord.com/invite/CkPqNUU4xS)

Features:

* 🏢**New block variations** New building approaches using new copper variations like doors, walls, chains, slabs and vertical cuts * 🔧 **The wrench tool** A new tool that allows players to rotate blocks easily. * ⚡ **Lightning-powered armor** An upgrade to conventional metallic armors that allow to use electricity from lightning bolts with new enchantments. * 🧲 **Magnetic-driven elevator mechanics** Magnetize your metallic armor with a coppered lodestone block, and travel at high speeds using 3x3 copper conduits. * 🔒 **Chest/Shulker locking with locks and keys** Lock your valuables with unique keys that you can make copies of using the new Locksmithing Table. * ⬆️ **Vertical redstone using copper wires** Feel like transfering redstone upwards looks kinda bad, or it's too expensive? Well, the copper wire is a new solution to that problem, it can transfer redstone upwards while looking nice and being as cheap as a redstone dust with a copper ingot. It is also a faster alternative, as you can place the wires like scaffolding blocks. * 📓 **Well documented and easy to understand wiki** [Check the wiki](https://github.com/ACovTeam/CopperOverhaulWiki/wiki) if you want to quickly know what X does, or check a recipe. [![Support Us](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/951860598394716171/986515680201408553/supportus.png)](https://ko-fi.com/agnyamods) **Made with 🧡 by AGNYA** *Copper Overhaul is only available for forge at the moment, a fabric version is being developed.*
